name: Reference
description: This is a reference for the objects below, not a variant. Each field is an example or description of its content.
location: The line range where the component is located (e.g. #L10-L20 means the component is between line 10 and 20). The range may not be exact, so leave a margin of error.

name: Flat
description: Card component with solid styling without border, glow, or heavy depth.

name: Bordered
description: Card component with card containers with clear border definition and low fill.

name: Neobrutalism
description: Card component with high-contrast neobrutalist styling with hard edges and bold outlines.

name: Glassmorphism
description: Card component with translucent glass-style surfaces with blur and layered depth.

name: Flat with icon
description: Card component with flat card surfaces with icon-led headings.

name: Bordered with icon
description: Card component with outlined cards that pair icon badges with text blocks.

name: Image cards
description: Card component with media-led cards with top image previews.

name: Image split
description: Card component with split card layout separating image and text columns.

name: Horizontal image card
description: Card component with horizontal card with side image and adjacent content.

name: Profile cards
description: Card component with person-profile cards with avatar, role, and social metadata.

name: Color cards
description: Card component with accent-color background cards for category or status grouping.
